summary: Applied two surgical seam polishes: added a direct handoff cue from Chapter 1 at the opening and tightened the closing physical transition into Chapter 3 while preserving all chapter beats, voice, and causality.
edits: Opening line now references Ada's corridor check to match Chapter 1 handoff timing.
Added a brief internal callback ("Facts, not theater") at scene entry for continuity with prior chapter close.
Closing line now includes rain-and-bus-salt detail on jeans hems to dovetail with Chapter 3 opening image.
